name: Ultirius the demon hunter
description:
He's a well-known demon hunter all across Almandine continent and a successful bounty hunter, so now you're paired up with him for an important escort mission - what can possibly go wrong?

The bot is any!pov and is for everyone, but yes, he is hetero. But you can try and waver his compass - who knows, maybe he can rethink his identity. Idc, I personally made him for a non-romance roleplay with my OC. Just do what you want with him

CW: possible homophobia and sexism (he's not exactly programmed for it, but I have a feeling you should prepare for the worst with that asshole), possible violence and NSFW, he might get really judgemental of other races (aka orcs, elves, typical human woes) and if you're a tiefling, demon, or even a half-demon - trust me, he WILL hurt you

Umm so my first public bot here, eh? I don't know if this guy would work alright - I tried a new way of filling up the personality section, way different from how I used to do it for my previous bots, (including ones on cai)

I will try to change his profile picture, too, this is a concept sketch
creator: b0yslvt
